key_visible_text: To the Editor: We were unaware of Journal policies on image manipulation and had altered our submission by using an artificial intelligence (AI) tool to move the ruler to the top of the image. We therefore wish to retract our image and case report. Editor's note: Authors are required to disclose any use of AI tools and any changes made to images.
